description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test that runs on a scheduled cron job, on push to specific branches and tags, and on pull requests. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to test on multiple operating systems (ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest) and Python versions (3.11, 3.12, 3.13). For each job, check out the source code, cache pip, npm, and mypy dependencies, set up Python and Node.js, install OS-specific dependencies, build the development environment, run tests, and upload code coverage to Codecov.
